title: Message
description: A single message within a conversation. Direction is from the conversation's perspective: `inbound` = arriving from the user/external party; `outbound` = sent by the agent or platform. Corresponds to a row in the `conversation_messages` table.

externalId.description: ID assigned by an external platform (e.g. a Twilio SID or Messenger message id).

organizationId.description: The organization that owns this message.

conversationId.description: The conversation this message belongs to.

direction.description: Message direction relative to the platform: `inbound` = from user/external, `outbound` = from agent/platform.

from.description: Abbreviated sender descriptor (wire shape used in API responses; full participant data lives in domain/participant.schema.json).

metadataJson.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to this message.

analyticsJson.description: Analytics data associated with this message (e.g. sentiment scores, token counts).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was last updated.

MessageContent.title: MessageContent
MessageContent.description: Structured content of a message. Currently always contains `items`; `text` and `structuredResponse` are the two supported item types.

items.description: Ordered list of content items that make up this message.

text.description: Convenience flat-text representation of the message (populated for simple text-only messages).

structuredResponse.description: Structured agent response payload. Shape varies by agent template.

ContentItem.title: ContentItem
ContentItem.description: A single content element within a message. Currently only `text` items are defined; additional types (image, file, tool_result) may be added in future protocol versions.
